decisions.summary: The PR is reviewable as one coherent evidence-freshness change because all changed code paths implement the same content-binding model across record, review, and PR gate consumers.
decisions.rationale: The blast radius is limited to VibePro evidence freshness plumbing and tests/docs for that story. No unrelated product behavior or independent cleanup is bundled.

decisions.summary: The two changed design docs are new story-specific architecture/spec documents for this implementation and are intentionally carried as story-local design artifacts.
decisions.rationale: They describe the content-scoped evidence freshness model introduced in this PR; no existing Design SSOT root is contradicted or superseded.

decisions.summary: Residual senior gaps are covered by current unit, full CLI regression, workflow replay, and final gate_evidence review.
decisions.rationale: Current-bound evidence includes strict-head negative path, content-bound review reuse/staleness, PR freshness details, artifact consistency diagnostics, and closed subagent review provenance.
